prompt: Inspect the new screenshot at /home/mia/Pictures/Screenshot_20260417_075259.png to verify that the TUI still shows the same Ava presence rows, then investigate why the recent ava-presence source change did not affect the live UI and determine what code path or loaded extension is actually driving those widgets.

primary.target: why ava-presence source change did not affect live UI

secondary.target: TUI still shows same Ava presence rows as before
which code path or loaded extension is actually driving the presence widgets
which installed/loaded version of ava-presence is being used at runtime vs source
whether npm build/publish cycle is needed to reflect source changes in live TUI
whether ~/.pva/agent/extensions/ or node_modules is serving the widget, not the edited source

assumptions: A recent change was made to ava-presence source files
The live TUI is still showing the old/unchanged widget behavior
The TUI is running pva from an installed or built artifact, not directly from source
The presence rows visible in the screenshot match a prior known state

east.text: Understand the gap between edited source and what the live TUI actually loads
Clarify whether ava-presence widgets are served from compiled node_modules, ~/.pva/extensions, or live source

south.text: Inspect screenshot to read current TUI presence row content
Trace which file/module is imported at runtime to render the presence widget
Check if a build step (tsc, tsup, npm build) is required before source changes reflect
Check if ~/.pva/agent/extensions/ overrides or shadows the monorepo source

west.text: Verify screenshot confirms presence rows are identical to before the source edit
Confirm identified code path actually drives what is visible in TUI

north.text: Report which exact file and module resolution path is driving the live widgets
Recommend corrective action so source edits reflect in live TUI (rebuild, relink, or copy)

actionStack.text: Read screenshot at /home/mia/Pictures/Screenshot_20260417_075259.png and note presence row content
Verify TUI presence rows match expected/prior state
Locate the recent ava-presence source change (git log or diff in packages/widgets/src/ava-presence/)
Determine module resolution: does pva load from node_modules dist, ~/.pva/extensions, or live source path
Check if a build artifact (dist/) exists and whether it is stale relative to source edits
Identify the actual code path driving the visible presence widgets at runtime
Confirm identified code path matches or diverges from edited source
Report finding and recommend action (rebuild/relink/copy) to close source-to-live tension

ambiguities.text: 'recent ava-presence source change' — which file was changed and what was changed is unspecified
ambiguities.suggestion: Run git log -5 -- packages/widgets/src/ava-presence/ to identify the exact change

ambiguities.text: 'live UI' — unclear whether pva is running as a dev build, installed binary, or symlinked package
ambiguities.suggestion: Check how pva is invoked and whether it resolves widgets from dist/ or src/

ambiguities.text: 'same Ava presence rows' — no prior screenshot or baseline provided to compare against
ambiguities.suggestion: Use the screenshot itself as the current state and compare against known widget definitions in types.ts
